name: Test News
descr: Maizie is my first rigged 3D character model. I tried to keep it simple but unique, and I think it turned out great. I spent a lot of time modeling the body, but I still managed to achieve an acceptable result. I'm proud of this project and want to further develop my character modeling skills.Maizie is my first rigged 3D character model. I tried to keep it simple but unique, and I think it turned out great. name: News Update!
descr: Hello! This website is almost complete. Today I added the News page, where you can read posts about 3D community and my projects. It wasn't so hard to code as yesterday, but still I had some problems. Fortunately, they're all fixed now. Besides adding new pages, I slightly edited the CSS and added '↩ Back' link. There are some other tasks to do, but all the main features are finished, I guess. Next time I want to translate the website into several languages, so I will have to put in a lot of work once again. Despite this I am full of enthusiasm and motivation to make this website amazing. See you later!
